generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance MotorActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Converts desired speed commands from ROS2 nodes into motor voltage commands via Vedder Electronic Speed Controller for propulsion"
]

instance SteeringServo : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controls directional adjustments of the autonomous vehicle via Jetson Orin Nano ROS2 nodes"
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "3D LiDAR sensor capturing real-time point cloud data of the vehicle's environment at high refresh rates for object detection and tracking"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Depth camera providing visual data for supplementary perception tasks including object classification and scene understanding"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance DepthCameraDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleStateMetricsTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom JetsonOrinNanoOnboardComputer
]

instance ObjectTracksTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DataPreProcessingFE
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance PointCloudClusteringTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Implements DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering for object detection and state estimation from LiDAR/Depth Camera data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance AccControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Computes desired speed based on lead vehicle distance (ISO 15622 compliant for performance class I)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance DataStorageModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stores object tracks and vehicle state data in SQL database for reporting"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabase
]

instance ThreeDVisualizationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Renders ego vehicle state, object tracks, and driving path using ROS2 + custom Python/C++ visualization nodes"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw 3D point cloud data from Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR at ~10Hz refresh rate"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudClusteringTrackingModel
]

instance DepthCameraData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Visual data from Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera for object classification and scene understanding"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthCameraDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudClusteringTrackingModel
]

instance VehicleStateMetrics : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time metrics including speed and steering angle transmitted from Jetson Orin Nano at sensor refresh rates"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateMetricsTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ThreeDVisualizationModel, AccControlModel
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Detected objects in proximity generated by DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering at ~10Hz"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTracksTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ThreeDVisualizationModel, DataStorageModel
]

instance ProjectedDrivingPathData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Computed driving path based on ACC control logic and object tracks for visualization"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AccControlModel
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ThreeDVisualizationModel
]

// C11: Enablers
instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Robot Operating System 2 providing inter-node communication, node lifecycle management, and hardware abstraction for all functional entities"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance NvidiaJetpack50 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA SDK for Jetson Orin Nano enabling GPU-accelerated perception tasks including point cloud processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables PointCloudClusteringTrackingModel
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Used for complex perception algorithms and control logic prototyping including point cloud clustering"
    DTDFVocab:enables AccControlModel
]

instance SQLDatabase : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database storing object tracks and vehicle state data for reporting"
    DTDFVocab:enables ReportGenerationService
]

instance WiFiNetwork : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Wireless network enabling inter-entity communication between vehicle and remote UI components"
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

// C6: Services
instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of ego vehicle state (speed, steering angle), object tracks, and projected driving path via 3D Visualization UI"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateVisualizationInsight, ObjectTrackVisualizationInsight, DrivingPathVisualizationInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Delegation of ACC control logic (lead vehicle detection, speed adjustment) from vehicle's ECU to Digital Twin Entity reducing onboard computational load"
    DTDFVocab:provides AccControlDecisionInsight
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote enable/disable of ACC, desired speed adjustment, and emergency braking via Control Panel UI"
    DTDFVocab:provides AccEnableDisableAction, SpeedAdjustmentAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance ReportGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Creation of human-readable reports containing time-series data of object tracks and vehicle state for post-mortem analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemPerformanceReportInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance VehicleStateVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of ego vehicle speed and steering angle metrics in 3D environment"
]

instance ObjectTrackVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual representation of detected objects in proximity with tracking trajectories"
]

instance DrivingPathVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Projection of computed driving path based on ACC control decisions"
]

instance AccControlDecisionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Transparent visualization of ACC decision-making process including lead vehicle detection and speed adjustment rationale"
]

instance AccEnableDisableAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote enable/disable functionality for ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SpeedAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote adjustment of desired speed for ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote initiation of emergency braking procedure"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SystemPerformanceReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Comprehensive report containing time-series analysis of object tracks and vehicle state metrics for post-mortem analysis"
]

// C12: Functional Entities
instance DataPreProcessingFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Performs DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering on sensor data to generate object tracks"
]

instance DataCollectingFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Stores processed object tracks and vehicle state data for visualization and reporting"
]

instance ControlPanelUI : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Remote user interface for ACC system management including enable/disable and speed adjustment controls"
]

instance ReportingFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Generates human-readable reports from stored time-series data for post-mortem analysis"
]

// C13: Physical Twin Entity
instance JetsonOrinNanoOnboardComputer : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano microcomputer hosting Physical Twin Entity with Jetpack 5.0 SDK for perception and control tasks"
    base:contains HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera, MotorActuator, SteeringServo
]

// C14: Digital Twin Entity
instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Centralized logical entity hosting all functional entities for perception, control, and visualization services"
    base:contains DataPreProcessingFE, DataCollectingFE, ControlPanelUI, ReportingFE
]

// C15: User Entity
instance RemoteWorkstation : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Remote workstation connected via Wi-Fi hosting visualization and control interfaces"
    base:contains ThreeDVisualizationModel, ControlPanelUI
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The interactions from the virtual world to the physical world include:
   - **Desired speed commands** computed by the **ACC Controlling FE** in the **Digital Twin Entity**, transmitted via **ROS2** and **Wi-Fi** to the **Actuation FE** in the **Physical Twin Entity**.
   - **Emergency braking commands** and **ACC enable/disable signals** sent from the **Control Panel (User Interface FE)** to the **Actuation FE** for immediate execution.
   - **Actuation commands** (motor voltage and steering servo signals) sent to the **Vedder Speed Controller** and **steering servo** via **ROS2 nodes** on the Jetson Orin Nano."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin operates on a **real-time, high-fidelity time scale**, synchronized with the physical twin via:
   - **Clock synchronization accuracy of ±100 ms** (due to hardware limitations) to ensure temporal alignment between virtual and physical systems.
   - **End-to-end latency constraint of ≤100 ms** (per **3GPP TS 22.185**) for V2V communication, critical for real-time ACC control.
   - **Perception cycles** (LiDAR/Depth Camera data processing) occurring at **~10Hz**, while **ACC control updates** occur at **~1Hz** (adjustments to desired speed)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin System (DTS) is orchestrated as a **three-tier architecture** aligned with the **ISO 23247 Reference Architecture**, with modifications:
   - **Physical Twin Entity**: Hosts **sensing (LiDAR/Depth Camera)**, **pre-processing (DBSCAN/Kalman)**, and **actuation (motor/steering)** functionalities on the **Jetson Orin Nano**.
   - **Digital Twin Entity**: Centralizes **data collection**, **ACC control**, **reporting**, and **data storage** (SQL database) on a **remote server/cloud**.
   - **User Entity**: Provides **3D visualization** and **control panel** interfaces via a **remote workstation**, connected via **Wi-Fi**.
   The system follows a **data-driven pipeline**:
     1. **Physical Twin → Data Pre-Processing FE** (ROS2) → **Data Collecting FE** (Digital Twin Entity).
     2. **Digital Twin Entity** computes **ACC logic** and **generates reports**.
     3. **User Entity** visualizes data and sends **control commands** back to the **Physical Twin Entity** via **ROS2/Wi-Fi**."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin supports **operational and testing phases** of the physical twin's lifecycle, covering:
   - **As-operated representation**: Real-time monitoring and control of the **1/10-scale autonomous vehicle** during operation.
   - **Development/testing phase**: Used for **remote debugging**, **parameter tuning**, and **compliance validation** (e.g., ISO 15622 for ACC performance class I).
   The DT does not explicitly model **as-designed** or **as-manufactured** phases but serves as a **cyber-physical experimentation facility** for the operational phase."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin achieves fidelity and validity through:
   - **High-fidelity perception models**: **DBSCAN + Kalman filtering** for object tracking, validated against real-world LiDAR/Depth Camera data.
   - **Real-time synchronization**: **Clock accuracy of ±100 ms** and **≤100 ms latency** ensure temporal alignment with the physical twin.
   - **Compliance validation**: ACC logic adheres to **ISO 15622 (performance class I)**, ensuring functional correctness.
   - **Verification mechanisms**:
     - **ROS2 testing frameworks** for node-level validation.
     - **Manual inspection** of **3D visualizations** for object track accuracy.
     - **SQL database logs** for post-mortem analysis of data integrity.
   - **Uncertainty sources**: **Sensor noise** (LiDAR/Depth Camera), **clock drift**, and **network latency** are mitigated via **ROS2 timestamping** and **hardware synchronization**."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin System employs the following technical connections:
  - **Intra-entity communication**: Uses **ROS2** for message-passing between software components within the same entity (e.g., Physical Twin Entity).
  - **Inter-entity communication**: Relies on a **Wi-Fi network** for data exchange between the vehicle (Physical Twin Entity) and remote components (Digital Twin/User Entities).
  The system does not explicitly specify transport protocols beyond Wi-Fi, though **UDP/TCP** could be inferred for ROS2 communication. Quality-of-Service (QoS) policies are implicitly enforced by the **100 ms latency** requirement."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin is hosted and deployed across:
   - **Edge Deployment**: **Physical Twin Entity** runs on the **Jetson Orin Nano** (onboard the vehicle), executing **real-time perception and actuation**.
   - **Cloud/Remote Deployment**: **Digital Twin Entity** and **User Entity** are hosted on a **remote workstation/server**, enabling **off-site monitoring and control**.
   - **Hardware Stack**:
     - **Jetson Orin Nano**: Runs **ROS2**, **Python/C++ nodes**, and **MATLAB/Simulink** for perception/control.
     - **Remote Server**: Hosts **SQL database**, **ACC logic**, and **reporting tools**.
     - **Workstation**: Runs **3D visualization UI** (Python/C++/ROS2) and **control panel** for remote management."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin integrates with external systems through:
  - **Standardized communication interfaces** (e.g., ROS2, Wi-Fi) to ensure interoperability with automotive middleware and cloud platforms.
  - **Cloud-based compute resources** for offloading non-critical tasks, enabling scalability and flexibility in deployment.
  The system does not explicitly mention integration with third-party tools (e.g., OpenCV, PCL) or cloud providers (e.g., AWS, GCP), though cloud integration is implied for offloading purposes."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin adheres to the following standards:
   - **ISO 23247 (Part 2)**: Reference Architecture for Digital Twins, adapted with a **Physical Twin Entity** to accommodate automotive-specific requirements (e.g., **LiDAR-based perception**).
   - **ISO 15622**: Standard for **Adaptive Cruise Control (ACC)**, ensuring compliance with **performance class I** requirements (no road curvature).
   - **IEC 62541 (OPC UA)**: Implicitly referenced as a potential standard for **data translation** between entities, though not explicitly implemented.
   - **3GPP TS 22.185**: Defines **≤100 ms latency** for V2V communication, influencing the **real-time synchronization** requirements (R7)."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin prioritizes safety and security through:
  - **Latency and synchronization constraints** (≤100 ms) to prevent timing-related failures in safety-critical operations.
  - **Safety-critical design**: Adherence to **ISO 15622** ensures ACC logic meets performance and reliability standards.
  - **Network isolation**: Wi-Fi-based communication between entities is implied to reduce risks of unauthorized access, though explicit security measures (e.g., encryption, audit logs) are not detailed in the document.
  Cybersecurity risks (e.g., injection attacks) are not addressed beyond the implicit reliance on standardized communication protocols."
]
